name: EnigmAgent — Local AI Secret Vault
summary: Secure local vault for AI agents: resolve API keys as {{PLACEHOLDER}} references. Zero cloud exposure.
description:
EnigmAgent is a local-first secret vault for AI agent developers and power users.

Features:
• AES-256-GCM encrypted local vault — no cloud, no telemetry
• {{PLACEHOLDER}} reference system for AI agent tool calls
• Integrates with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, and 40+ frameworks
• Domain binding security: each secret only accessible from its registered origin
• Full offline operation — nothing leaves your machine

This extension connects to the EnigmAgent local server (127.0.0.1:3737) to resolve placeholder references in AI prompts and browser automation.

Documentation: https://docs.enigmagent.com
Source: https://github.com/enigmagent/enigmagent
